mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCTS ( product_id, product_name, product_type, min_period_month, max_period_month, min_amount, max_amount, target_large, target_detail, product_desc, interest_payment_type, applied_exchange_rate_type, created_at, created_by, rate_category ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCTS.NEXTVAL, #{product_name}, #{product_type}, #{min_period_month}, #{max_period_month}, #{min_amount}, #{max_amount}, #{target_large}, #{target_detail}, #{product_desc}, #{interest_payment_type}, #{applied_exchange_rate_type}, SYSDATE, #{created_by}, #{rate_category} )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_PDFS ( pdf_id, product_id, basic_terms_path, category_terms_path, special_terms_path, product_guide_path, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_PDFS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id}, #{basic_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{special_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_guide_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_REQUESTS ( request_id, product_id, requester_id, request_status, request_type, requeste_date ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_REQUESTS.NEXTVAL, #{requester_id}, #{product_id}, 'WAITING', 'CREATE', SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT product_no, product_name, product_type, min_amount, max_amount, approve_status, create_date, created_by, active
FROM PRODUCTS
ORDER BY product_no DESC

SELECT P.product_no, P.product_name, P.product_type, P.min_period_month, P.max_period_month, P.min_amount, P.max_amount, P.target_large, P.target_detail, P.product_desc, P.interest_payment_type, P.applied_exchange_rate_type, P.create_date, P.update_date, P.created_by, P.approver, P.approve_status, P.updated_by, P.app_start_date, P.app_end_date, P.rate_category, P.active,
PDF.basic_terms_path, PDF.category_terms_path, PDF.special_terms_path, PDF.product_guide_path
FROM PRODUCTS P
LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_PDFS PDF ON P.product_no = PDF.product_no
WHERE P.product_no = #{product_no}

SELECT product_no, product_name, product_type, approve_status, create_date, created_by, active
FROM PRODUCTS
WHERE approve_status = #{approve_status}
ORDER BY product_no DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE PRODUCTS
product_name = #{product_name},
product_type = #{product_type},
min_period_month = #{min_period_month},
max_period_month = #{max_period_month},
min_amount = #{min_amount},
max_amount = #{max_amount},
target_large = #{target_large},
target_detail = #{target_detail},
product_desc = #{product_desc},
interest_payment_type = #{interest_payment_type},
applied_exchange_rate_type = #{applied_exchange_rate_type},
app_start_date = #{app_start_date},
app_end_date = #{app_end_date},
rate_category = #{rate_category},
approve_status = 'SAVE',
update_date = SYSDATE, updated_by = #{updated_by}
WHERE product_no = #{product_no} AND approve_status = 'SAVE'

UPDATE PRODUCTS
product_name = #{product_name},
product_type = #{product_type},
min_period_month = #{min_period_month},
max_period_month = #{max_period_month},
min_amount = #{min_amount},
max_amount = #{max_amount},
target_large = #{target_large},
target_detail = #{target_detail},
product_desc = #{product_desc},
interest_payment_type = #{interest_payment_type},
applied_exchange_rate_type = #{applied_exchange_rate_type},
app_start_date = #{app_start_date},
app_end_date = #{app_end_date},
rate_category = #{rate_category},
approve_status = 'SUBMIT',
update_date = SYSDATE, updated_by = #{updated_by}
WHERE product_no = #{product_no} AND approve_status = 'SAVE'

UPDATE PRODUCT_PDFS
basic_terms_path = #{basic_terms_path},
category_terms_path = #{category_terms_path},
special_terms_path = #{special_terms_path},
product_guide_path = #{product_guide_path},
update_date = SYSDATE
WHERE product_no = #{product_no}
